description: Consumables from Five Parsecs From Home Core Rules (p.54). Using a consumable is a Free Action. A character using two in one round must spend a Combat Action. Consumables are not carried by a specific character — any crew member may access them from the Stash. Bots and Soulless cannot use consumables. All items are single-use.

rules.same_item_twice: No benefit from consuming two of the same item in a single round

consumables.name: Booster Pills
consumables.description: When taken, the character removes all Stun markers. They may move at double normal Speed this round.

consumables.name: Combat Serum
consumables.description: The character receives +2" Speed and +2 Reactions for the rest of the battle.

consumables.name: Kiranin Crystals
consumables.description: A bright, dazzling display of hypnotic lights will daze any character within 4" of the user, making them unable to act this round. The crystals have no effect on characters that already acted earlier in the round, and do not affect the user. A character that is attacked in Brawling combat will defend themselves normally.

consumables.name: Rage Out
consumables.description: The user gains +2" Speed and +1 to all Brawling rolls for the rest of this and the following round. A K'Erin user gets the benefits for the rest of the battle.

consumables.name: Still
consumables.description: The user gains +1 to Hit, but cannot Move during this and the next round.

consumables.name: Stim-pack
consumables.description: If a character would become a casualty, they remain on the table with a single Stun marker. This item can be used reflexively upon becoming a casualty. It does not require an action.
